{# Furo sidebar brand override: Prerau Lab eyebrow above the project name, sleepEEG.org link below. #}
Prerau Lab
sleepEEG.org {%- block brand_content %} {%- if theme_light_logo and theme_dark_logo %} {%- elif logo_url %} {%- endif %} {%- if not theme_sidebar_hide_name %} {{ docstitle if docstitle else project }} {%- endif %} {%- endblock brand_content %}
